title: Fragments from "The Mysterious Key And What It Opened"
content:
Love comes to all soon or late,
        And maketh gay or sad;
        For every bird will find its mate,
        And every lass a lad,
meaning:
Louisa May Alcott's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Fragments from "The Mysterious Key And What It Opened""...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
